disable_sysmain.name: Disable SysMain (Superfetch)
disable_sysmain.description: Stops background app preloading into RAM — useful on SSDs
disable_sysmain.hint: May slow down program launches on HDDs

disable_search_indexing.name: Disable Search Indexing
disable_search_indexing.hint: Reduces background disk load. Results may differ on SSD and HDD. Requires administrator · Medium risk

disable_prefetch.name: Disable Prefetch
disable_prefetch.hint: Reduces background disk activity. Results may differ on SSD and HDD. Requires administrator · Reboot · Medium risk

high_timer_resolution.name: High Timer Resolution
high_timer_resolution.description: Improves system timer precision — fewer micro-stutters in games
high_timer_resolution.hint: Improves system timer precision — fewer micro-stutters in games. Results may differ on SSD and HDD. Requires administrator

disable_background_apps.name: Disable Background UWP Apps
disable_background_apps.description: Prevents Store apps from running in the background
disable_background_apps.hint: Prevents Store apps from running in the background. Results may differ on SSD and HDD.

disable_hibernation.name: Disable Hibernation
disable_hibernation.description: Frees disk space equal to your RAM size
disable_hibernation.hint: Frees disk space equal to your RAM size. Results may differ on SSD and HDD. Requires administrator

optimize_svchost.name: Optimize svchost
optimize_svchost.description: Groups services to reduce the number of svchost processes
optimize_svchost.hint: Groups services to reduce the number of svchost processes. Results may differ on SSD and HDD. Requires administrator · Reboot · Medium risk

clear_temp_files.name: Clear Temporary Files
clear_temp_files.hint: Deletes contents of Temp folders. Results may differ on SSD and HDD. One-time action

enable_game_mode.name: Enable Game Mode
enable_game_mode.description: Windows prioritizes resources for the active game
enable_game_mode.hint: Windows prioritizes resources for the active game. Restart the game after applying.

disable_game_mode.name: Disable Game Mode
disable_game_mode.hint: Disables Windows Game Mode. Restart the game after applying.

enable_hags.name: Enable HAGS
enable_hags.description: Hardware-accelerated GPU scheduling — reduces frame latency
enable_hags.hint: Requires a GPU with WDDM 2.7+ support

disable_hags.name: Disable HAGS
disable_hags.hint: Restores software GPU scheduling. Restart the game after applying. Requires administrator · Reboot

disable_game_dvr.name: Disable Xbox Game DVR
disable_game_dvr.description: Removes background game recording — can boost FPS by 3–10%
disable_game_dvr.hint: Removes background game recording — can boost FPS by 3–10%. Restart the game after applying.

disable_fullscreen_optimizations.name: Disable Fullscreen Optimizations
disable_fullscreen_optimizations.description: Games run in true fullscreen — less input lag
disable_fullscreen_optimizations.hint: Games run in true fullscreen — less input lag. Restart the game after applying. Medium risk

disable_mouse_acceleration.name: Disable Mouse Acceleration
disable_mouse_acceleration.description: Turns off "Enhance pointer precision" — 1:1 mouse movement
disable_mouse_acceleration.hint: Turns off "Enhance pointer precision" — 1:1 mouse movement. Restart the game after applying.

mmcss_games_priority.name: MMCSS Priority for Games
mmcss_games_priority.description: Raises multimedia scheduler priority for games
mmcss_games_priority.hint: Raises multimedia scheduler priority for games. Restart the game after applying. Requires administrator

disable_xbox_services.name: Disable Xbox Services
disable_xbox_services.hint: Stops background Xbox Live services. Restart the game after applying. Requires administrator

enable_shader_cache.name: Optimize Shader Cache
enable_shader_cache.hint: Improves DirectX shader caching. Close games before applying. Requires administrator

disable_dxgi_flip_model.name: Disable DXGI Flip Model Upgrade
disable_dxgi_flip_model.hint: Prevents automatic display mode switching. Close games before applying. Medium risk

clear_shader_cache.name: Clear Shader Cache

clear_shader_cache.hint: Deletes DirectX shader cache (D3DSCache, NVIDIA, AMD). Close games before applying. One-time action

export_dxdiag.name: Export DxDiag

export_dxdiag.hint: Saves a DirectX report to the desktop. Close games before applying. One-time action

directx_12_ultimate_hint.hint: Information on enabling DX12 Ultimate via GPU driver. Close games before applying. One-time action

force_discrete_gpu_opengl.hint: Forces the dedicated GPU for OpenGL applications. For OpenGL games and emulators. NVIDIA/AMD only

disable_opengl_vsync.name: Disable VSync (OpenGL)

disable_opengl_vsync.hint: Removes frame rate cap tied to monitor refresh rate. For OpenGL games and emulators. Medium risk

nvidia_max_prerendered_frames.name: NVIDIA Pre-rendered Frames

nvidia_max_prerendered_frames.hint: Optimizes frame queue to reduce latency. For OpenGL games and emulators. Requires administrator · Medium risk · NVIDIA only

amd_texture_quality_performance.hint: Tip: adjust texture filtering in Radeon Software. For OpenGL games and emulators. One-time action · AMD only

disable_app_tracking.hint: Blocks apps from accessing account information. Some settings take effect after reboot.
